posts.author: Samarth_Nagpal
posts.community: V2 Retail - Second innings playing out well
posts.text: Very solid Q1 updates. While going into nitty gritty will bring out different takes but what’s heartening to see is breathtaking execution on a heavy base. What’s also good to see that even V Mart has come up with decent update. Disc: no reco & biased in V2 retail be9a273b-3ce0-4be0-8115-707cbd14594a.pdf (247.0 KB)
